message:
fix(pager): reject reads of pages freed in same transaction

Added a guard in StagedTransaction::get_page that checks freed_pages
before attempting to read. Previously, freeing a page and then reading
it in the same transaction would return stale data or corrupt pages,
since the page was already added to the freelist but the read path
didn't check for this.

Now returns DatabaseCorrupt error with clear message identifying the
freed page. This prevents subtle corruption bugs where code accidentally
reads freed pages.

Added test: get_page_rejects_page_freed_in_same_transaction verifies
the error is returned with appropriate message.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
